question: When was the first case of the Gamma Variant of SARS-CoV-2 detected in travelers arriving in Tokyo from Brazil?
ground_truth: The first case was detected in January 2021.
event_desc: The first case of the Gamma Variant of SARS-CoV-2, also known as the Manaus variant, is detected in four people who arrived in Tokyo after visiting the Amazonas region of Brazil four days prior.
